body:
## Summary
- Section 四 (10 Buff 池设计) → rewritten to "Buff 池实现现状 (v1.0)" showing actual 9 buff types, 3 in upgrade pool vs 6 defined-but-pending vs 2 unimplemented
- Section 7.1 — ALL_CHIPS_BONUS was kept as type (not deleted), updated decision
- Section 7.2 — tiered hand buffs exist as types but not yet in upgrade pool
- Section 7.5 — leech/healing was never implemented, marked as deferred
- Section 7.8 — only Energy+1 (SKILL_ENERGY_MAX) was implemented; Shuffle+1 and Hand+1 never coded, with rationale

## Files changed
- `CardGame/docs/numeric_thinking.md` — new file on main, reflects actual code state
title: docs: update numeric_thinking.md to reflect actual v1.0 code
